# Chapter 10: Engineering project management  (~100 pp)
- 10.1 Projects as systems (10) · 10.2 Work-breakdown structure and estimation (12) · 10.3 Scheduling: PERT, CPM, critical chain, resource-constrained (18) · 10.4 Risk management: registers, qualitative and quantitative analysis (15) · 10.5 Stakeholder analysis and communication plans (10) · 10.6 Earned-value management (12) · 10.7 Programme and portfolio management (10) · 10.8 Failure section: schedule cynicism, scope creep, hidden dependencies, megaproject pathologies (13)

**Archetype**: scaling, control, ethics. **Project**: lead a six-week engineering mini-project end to end with EVM tracking; produce a closeout report. **Exercises**: 25.
